sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_results(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT t.term_id, slug, tt.taxonomy, tt.term_taxonomy_id FROM $wpdb->terms t, $wpdb->term_taxonomy tt
					WHERE LOWER(t.slug) NOT REGEXP(%s) AND tt.taxonomy NOT REGEXP ('^pa_.*$') AND tt.term_id = t.term_id",
				self::ALLOWED_CHARS_REGEX
			)
		)

sinks.expression:
$wpdb->get_results(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT t.term_id, slug, tt.taxonomy, tt.term_taxonomy_id FROM $wpdb->terms t, $wpdb->term_taxonomy tt
					WHERE LOWER(t.slug) NOT REGEXP(%s) AND tt.taxonomy NOT REGEXP ('^pa_.*$') AND tt.term_id = t.term_id",
				self::ALLOWED_CHARS_REGEX
			)
		)

printf(
			'<input %1$s name="%2$s[%3$s]" id="%3$s" type="%4$s"' .
			' placeholder="%5$s" value="%6$s" autocomplete="%7$s" data-lpignore="%8$s" class="regular-text" />',
			disabled( $arguments['disabled'], true, false ),
			esc_html( $this->option_name() ),
			esc_attr( $arguments['field_id'] ),
			esc_attr( $arguments['type'] ),
			esc_attr( $arguments['placeholder'] ),
			esc_html( $value ),
			esc_attr( $autocomplete ),
			esc_attr( $lp_ignore )
		)

printf(
			'<input %1$s name="%2$s[%3$s]" id="%3$s" type="%4$s"' .
			' placeholder="%5$s" value="%6$s" class="regular-text" min="%7$s" max="%8$s" step="%9$s" />',
			disabled( $arguments['disabled'], true, false ),
			esc_html( $this->option_name() ),
			esc_attr( $arguments['field_id'] ),
			esc_attr( $arguments['type'] ),
			esc_attr( $arguments['placeholder'] ),
			esc_html( $value ),
			esc_attr( $min ),
			esc_attr( $max ),
			esc_attr( $step )
		)

printf(
			'<textarea %1$s name="%2$s[%3$s]" id="%3$s" placeholder="%4$s" rows="5" cols="50">%5$s</textarea>',
			disabled( $arguments['disabled'], true, false ),
			esc_html( $this->option_name() ),
			esc_attr( $arguments['field_id'] ),
			esc_attr( $arguments['placeholder'] ),
			wp_kses_post( $value )
		)

printf(
			'<select %1$s name="%2$s[%3$s]">%4$s</select>',
			disabled( $element_disabled, true, false ),
			esc_html( $this->option_name() ),
			esc_html( $arguments['field_id'] ),
			wp_kses(
				$options_markup,
				[
					'option' => [
						'value'    => [],
						'selected' => [],
						'disabled' => [],
					],
				]
			)
		)

printf(
			'<select %1$s multiple="multiple" name="%2$s[%3$s][]">%4$s</select>',
			disabled( $element_disabled, true, false ),
			esc_html( $this->option_name() ),
			esc_html( $arguments['field_id'] ),
			wp_kses(
				$options_markup,
				[
					'option' => [
						'value'    => [],
						'selected' => [],
						'disabled' => [],
					],
				]
			)
		)

printf(
				'<input name="%1$s[%2$s][%3$s]" id="%4$s" type="%5$s"' .
				' placeholder="%6$s" value="%7$s" class="regular-text" />',
				esc_html( $this->option_name() ),
				esc_attr( $arguments['field_id'] ),
				esc_attr( $key ),
				esc_attr( $id ),
				'text',
				esc_attr( $arguments['placeholder'] ),
				esc_html( $cell_value )
			)
wp_send_json_error( esc_html__( 'Your session has expired. Please reload the page.', 'cyr2lat' ) )
wp_send_json_error( esc_html__( 'You are not allowed to perform this action.', 'cyr2lat' ) )

sanitizers.expression:
$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT t.term_id, slug, tt.taxonomy, tt.term_taxonomy_id FROM $wpdb->terms t, $wpdb->term_taxonomy tt
					WHERE LOWER(t.slug) NOT REGEXP(%s) AND tt.taxonomy NOT REGEXP ('^pa_.*$') AND tt.term_id = t.term_id",
				self::ALLOWED_CHARS_REGEX
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT slug FROM $wpdb->terms t LEFT JOIN $wpdb->term_taxonomy tt
							ON t.term_id = tt.term_id
							WHERE LOWER(t.slug) = LOWER(%s)",
			$slug
		)

					WHERE LOWER(t.slug) NOT REGEXP(%s) AND tt.taxonomy NOT REGEXP ('^pa_.*$') AND tt.term_id = t.term_id",
				self::ALLOWED_CHARS_REGEX
			)
		)
